destinations.evidence: Image, audio, and video payloads are explicitly routed to base ExecutorRequest decoding and executor/TTL validation, with no modality-specific fields required for static admission.

equivalence_argument: Multimodal payload validation decodes only the base executor request fields and applies the same zero-executor and TTL bounds as other executor requests; malformed base ABI data fails decode.
notes: The v2 port does not add width/duration/model checks in static payload validation; those belong to later fee/settlement paths.
rationale: The new validators for 0x0818, 0x0819, and 0x081A all implement the same base executor/TTL validation, matching the commit message's missing RPC validation fix. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: validate_image_call_payload, validate_audio_call_payload, and validate_video_call_payload must decode the base ExecutorRequest fields and reject decode failures, zero executor addresses, ttl 0, and ttl values greater than MAX_TTL_BLOCKS; otherwise they must accept the payload without modality-specific extra fields.
suggested_falsification_tests: For each of image, audio, and video payload validators, pass a valid base ExecutorRequest and assert Ok; then pass malformed bytes, executor zero, ttl zero, and ttl MAX_TTL_BLOCKS+1 and assert DecodeFailed with the modality label, ExecutorZeroAddress, TTLZero, and TTLExceeded respectively.
summary: Multimodal payloads use base executor validation.
test_or_falsification_candidate: For each of image, audio, and video payload validators, pass a valid base ExecutorRequest and assert Ok; then pass malformed bytes, executor zero, ttl zero, and ttl MAX_TTL_BLOCKS+1 and assert DecodeFailed with the modality label, ExecutorZeroAddress, TTLZero, and TTLExceeded respectively.
title: Multimodal payloads use base executor validation
